case_title: OTTO GRIFFIN VS. KIMBERLY M WHITE

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION AND DECLARATION FOR ORDER (DOMESTIC VIOLENCE) FILED BY PERSON TO BE PROTECTED GRIFFIN, OTTO AS TO PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED WHITE, KIMBERLY M
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE (APPLICATION, OSC & TRO) FILED BY PERSON TO BE PROTECTED GRIFFIN, OTTO
RESPONSIVE DECLARATION TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OR NOTICE OF MOTION FILED BY RESPONDENT WHITE, KIMBERLY M
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL (RESPONSIVE DECLARATION TO OSC OR NOM) FILED BY RESPONDENT WHITE, KIMBERLY M
FINDINGS AND ORDER AFTER HEARING (HEAD 3/5/02)- SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER FILED BY PERSON TO BE PROTECTED GRIFFIN, OTTO AS TO PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED WHITE, KIMBERLY M HEARING SET FOR MAR-05-2002 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 404
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE- MARJORIE A. SLABACH

GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THE COURT ISSUED A NON-CLETS MUTUAL R/O, WHEREIN NEITHER PARTY SHALL CONTACT, HARASS, TELEPHONE, SEND ANY MESSAGES TO OR DISTURB THE PEACE OF THE OTHER PARTY @ THEIR RESPECTIVE RESIDENCES AND PLACES OF EMPLOYMENT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-05-2002 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 404
